name: Chocolate Almond Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the chopped toasted almonds in a food processor or blender.
2. With the processor running, add the extracts.
3. Stop the processor and scrape down the sides of the bowl.
4. Blend for an additional 10 seconds.
5. Add the chopped toasted almonds.
6. Store the mixture in the refrigerator.
